overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a foggy, neon-lit Night City street at night, approaching a secure industrial facility with massive satellite dishes, and entering through a covered loading dock into a restricted security zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban intersection with neon food truck

events.description: crossing the street at a crosswalk while vehicles pass by
pedestrian with glowing cybernetic glasses passes close to camera

agents.ego_description: walking across the foggy intersection toward the industrial facility with satellite dishes visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing blue glasses crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: tall street lamp illuminating the foggy intersection with warm yellow light
traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
food truck with bright pink and purple neon lights parked on the street corner
green street sign mounted on a pole at the intersection
zebra crossing painted on the asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a foggy Night City intersection at night, crossing the street near a neon-lit food truck. Street lamps cast a yellow glow through the heavy fog as vehicles pass by, and a pedestrian with glowing cybernetic glasses crosses the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial facility perimeter with satellite dishes

events.description: turning onto sidewalk along the security fence of the industrial facility

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching the secure facility entrance with large satellite dishes visible behind the fence

entered.detail: tall black metal security fence surrounding the industrial facility
massive satellite dishes mounted on the facility roof visible through the fog
palm tree growing on the sidewalk near the facility perimeter
gated entrance to the secure facility with overhead covering

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the perimeter of a secure industrial facility, passing a palm tree and following the security fence. Massive satellite dishes loom in the foggy background as the camera approaches the facility entrance.

events.description: entering the covered facility gate from the outdoor street
transitioning from outdoor fog to artificial fluorescent lighting under the covered structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered security gate into the facility's loading area

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal structure covering the facility entrance
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling of the covered entrance
yellow and black striped security barrier arm blocking vehicle access
raised concrete loading platform for industrial vehicles

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered loading dock area through a security gate, transitioning from the foggy exterior to an artificially lit interior space. Fluorescent lights illuminate the concrete driveway as the camera approaches the main facility entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure facility interior with industrial containers

events.description: encountering an NPC in a suit standing near red industrial containers
security guard in heavy armor appears near the checkpoint ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the secure facility interior, passing an NPC and approaching a security checkpoint

notable_agents.action: man in business suit standing near red containers, turns to watch the player pass
security guard in heavy armor and helmet walking toward the checkpoint

entered.detail: stacked red and black industrial shipping containers with warning labels
illuminated white '06' sign mounted on the facility building wall
small guard booth with glass windows at the security checkpoint
metal security gate blocking access to the restricted area

segments.scene_description: Inside the secure facility, the player passes an NPC in a suit standing near industrial containers and approaches a security checkpoint. A guard in heavy armor patrols near a barrier gate beneath an illuminated '06' sign on the building wall.

events.description: worker in hazmat suit visible near the warehouse entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the security checkpoint and warehouse entrance where a worker in protective gear is visible

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow hazmat suit walking away from camera toward the warehouse interior

entered.detail: large open doorway leading into the facility warehouse with bright interior lighting
wooden shipping crates and pallets stacked near the entrance
metal desk with equipment at the security checkpoint
blue and green industrial containers stacked near the warehouse door

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the final security checkpoint before the warehouse entrance, passing industrial crates and containers. A worker in a yellow hazmat suit walks toward the brightly lit warehouse interior as the camera moves deeper into the secure facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy, neon-lit city street into the sterile, high-security interior of an industrial facility. It begins at a misty intersection where yellow street lamps and neon food trucks illuminate the haze, passing a pedestrian with glowing cybernetic glasses. As the camera moves along a security fence and past a lone palm tree, the scene shifts toward the perimeter of the facility where massive satellite dishes loom through the fog. The perspective then transitions from the damp exterior into a covered loading dock, where the natural mist is replaced by the harsh glare of fluorescent lights reflecting off concrete. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the secure zone, passing armored guards and industrial containers before following a worker in a yellow hazmat suit toward the brightly lit warehouse interior.
